scripts.test: npm run typecheck && node --import tsx scripts/check-content-boundary.ts && npm --workspace @kontour/console-core test && npm --workspace @kontour/console-server test && npm --workspace @kontour/console-ui test && npm --workspace @kontour/console-ui run typecheck && npm run test:browser
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && npm --workspace @kontour/console-core run typecheck && npm --workspace @kontour/console-server run typecheck && npm --workspace @kontour/console-ui run typecheck
